recommendations.title: Sweetheart
recommendations.overview: A working woman, mother a three children, realizes that, when her youngest one is about to go to Canada to continue her education, she will end up out of her most precious goal, being a mother.

recommendations.title: The Book of Wonders
recommendations.overview: This is the crazy bet of a mother ready to do anything to help her 12-year-old son, Louis, wake up from his coma. After Louis' accident, Thelma decides to do for him the "10 things to do before the end of the world" that he had written in his diary.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Buried Alive

recommendations.title: Our Little Sister
recommendations.overview: After the death of their estranged father, 3 adult sisters invite their teenaged half-sister to live with them.

recommendations.title: The Intruders
recommendations.overview: After the traumatic loss of her mother, a teenaged girl tries to uncover the dark secrets behind her new home, in spite of her father's disbelief.
